title: Non-record: O(n) field LM, 2L FP16 (no attention)
author: galaxy4552

data.description: Uses a field-based representation with linear-time scoring instead of pairwise token interactions or attention
Embedding compression and simple deterministic inference focused on CPU-friendly low-latency systems

novel_contributions: Alternative to transformer-based language models using field-based representation
Linear-time scoring function (O(n)) without attention or transformer weights
CPU-friendly model under 16MB with low latency suitable for IME and deterministic inference
Embedding compression and alternative token interaction approach
